creator: freebsd@mnd.sc
text:
security/p5-Crypt-SMIME 0.19 fails when building against LibreSSL from ports because support for CMS (Cryptographic Message Syntax) is disabled:

In file included from SMIME.xs:12:
/usr/local/include/openssl/cms.h:62:2: error: CMS is disabled.
#error CMS is disabled.
 ^
1 error generated.
*** [SMIME.o] Error code 1
